title: AGF Prefab
description: A reusable bundle of components. Scenes can instantiate prefabs with optional per-instance overrides. The component set itself is validated against the scene component schemas at scene-load time, not at prefab parse time, because prefabs may carry project-extension components.

agfFormatVersion.description: AGF project format version. Mirrors the project.json field so each prefab travels with its own version stamp.

id.description: Project-local prefab id. Referenced from scenes via `instances: [{ prefab: <id> }]`.

components.description: Default component values. Scene-level overrides are merged on top of these at scene-load time.

tags.description: Optional free-form tags for grouping (e.g. `pickup`, `hazard`). No engine semantics.
